results.title: Ritvik Saini
highlights:
Agentic AI Engineer at [Omnicom Global Solutions](https://www.linkedin.com/company/omnicomglobalsolutions)
...
Agentic AI Engineer and Data Scientist specializing in AI agents, LLM orchestration, and intelligent automation systems. Over the past few years, I’ve worked at the intersection of machine learning, backend engineering, and large language models (LLMs), building systems that connect data, APIs, and reasoning engines to generate contextual insights and automate complex workflows. My career started in industrial AI, where I developed predictive and optimization models using LSTM, Random Forest, and ANN architectures. These systems helped manufacturing, steel, cement, HVAC, and automotive industries reduce downtime, optimize energy usage, and improve operational decision-making through data-driven insights. Currently, I focus on designing AI agent architectures and automation platforms. I’ve built multi-agent communication systems using Python, API orchestration, and streamable HTTP protocols, enabling agents to analyze data, access enterprise systems, and generate intelligent responses. On the infrastructure side, I develop scalable backend systems using PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy ORM, and object storage pipelines, enabling seamless interaction between AI agents and large datasets. Core expertise: • Agentic AI & Multi-Agent Systems • Prompt Engineering & LLM Integration • Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) • Predictive Analytics & Optimization • Data Pipelines, APIs & Backend Systems Selected highlights: • Built modular AI agent architecture enabling LLM–backend communication and workflow automation • Developed predictive maintenance models reducing equipment downtime and improving operational efficiency • Applied ANN + optimization techniques to HVAC systems, improving energy efficiency • Built automated root-cause analytics frameworks for industrial data systems I’m passionate about building scalable AI ecosystems that combine reasoning, automation, and data intelligence to transform how organizations use data.

...
### Identifying Longevity Risk with Machine Learning
...
Traditional approaches to predicting life outcomes are robust and interpretable but come with limitations. They are limited in the number of interactions between medical conditions (“comorbidities”) that can be considered, unable to handle missing values, and have a fixed base table shape. We developed a machine learning model (the Longevity Risk Model) to address these limitations. Its target is to identify insureds where our traditional model (“RevH”) is likely too long (low longevity risk) or too short (high longevity risk). Our goal is to expand the ideas behind the Longevity Risk Model and find creative ways to improve its predictions. These improvements might include, but are not limited to, identifying COVID deaths in our dataset and adding COVID as a feature to the model, using quantile objective functions to make prediction intervals, altering the structure of the stacked models, and predicting the conditional probability of outliving life expectancy. Show less

results.title: Omnicom Group AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Omnicom Group has emerged as a major player in AI-driven marketing transformation, particularly following its $9 billion acquisition of Interpublic Group (IPG) completed in November 2025[1]. The company has positioned itself as 'the world's leading marketing and sales company, built for intelligent growth in the next era'[2] through its comprehensive AI platform Omni. With the IPG merger, Omnicom now commands $73.5 billion in annual media and commerce buying power and operates with 2.6 billion verified global IDs through Acxiom RealID[3]. CEO John Wren has strategically positioned AI as central to the company's future, stating that AI is 'supercharging creativity' and enabling outcome-based compensation models[4]. The company's AI initiatives span from generative content creation through ArtBotAI to sophisticated audience analysis via Omni Assist, with clients like AT&T reporting 40% increases in ad engagement[5].

results.title: Sean Betts
highlights:
### Chief AI & Innovation Officer at [Omnicom Media Group UK](
...
://www.linkedin.com/company/omg_uk) (Current)
...
As Chief AI & Innovation Officer at Omnicom Media Group UK, I lead the organisation's AI and innovation strategy, driving business transformation across our network of agencies and clients. I lead the AI Centre of Excellence, developing and implementing forward-thinking generative AI initiatives that enhance operational efficiency and create transformative client solutions. My role combines strategic leadership with hands-on innovation, focusing on three key areas: AI & Business Transformation, Client Solutions & Consultancy, and Thought Leadership. I work closely with the OMG UK board to shape our long-term technology vision while providing strategic guidance to our most important clients on leveraging AI to achieve their business objectives. I collaborate with global and local stakeholders to identify emerging capabilities, develop new AI use cases, and ensure all innovations align with Omnicom's global guidelines. A significant part of my mandate involves positioning OMG UK as a leader in shaping the future of the UK marketing industry through thought leadership, speaking engagements, and industry partnerships. Leading the cultural transformation necessary for AI adoption, I oversee the development of comprehensive AI readiness programs and foster a culture of innovation across OMG UK, ensuring we remain at the forefront of technological advancement in the marketing industry.

the field: 1. GenAI

I lead the group-wide product and technology strategy, overseeing an expansive team dedicated to developing and deploying transformational products, advanced cloud technology, and innovative operational processes. I am responsible for OMG UK’s Artificial Intelligence strategy, leveraging my expertise in product innovation to build cutting-edge generative AI applications. I continually push the boundaries of what is possible, transforming complex AI concepts into practical business solutions that will be integrated into the core of OMG UK’s operations. Recognising the crucial role of education in AI adoption, I place a strong emphasis on fostering a culture of continuous learning across the group. My focus on AI education is enabling OMG UK to navigate the rapidly evolving technology landscape, driving innovation, and setting new industry standards. I lead a group of 150 data scientists, analysts, marketing technologists, data architects, and developers, who work in unison to support the four media agencies within OMG UK and their extensive portfolio of 250 clients.

results.title: Senior AI and Data Engineer – Publicis Groupe
highlights:
# Senior AI and Data Engineer
...
Company descriptionPublicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients' challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy. Overview As a Senior AI & Data Engineer at Publicis Intelligence, you will play a key role in our journey towards becoming a more AI-driven consulting and product organization. The role is highly hands-on and technical, while also having clear strategic impact. You will join a team with strong existing capabilities in data, analytics, MarTech and insights. Generative AI and agent-based solutions are the next major focus area in our development. You will take technical leadership within GenAI. This includes identifying opportunities, shaping solutions and driving implementations from idea to production. You will work closely with other agencies and technical stakeholders across the organization. Your mission is to design, build and deploy AI solutions that create real business value, both internally and for our clients. Internally, this means improving efficiency, automation, decision support and new ways of working. Externally, you will help develop AI-driven capabilities that strengthen our clients' businesses. You act as the bridge between business needs, strategic goals and technical delivery. You ensure that solutions are robust, scalable and commercially relevant. This role is based in Stockholm and involves close collaboration with teams in Sweden and Denmark, as well as with Publicis' global AI initiatives. Responsibilities
...
- You are responsible for developing and scaling AI and GenAI solutions that deliver clear, measurable business impact for both internal teams and clients. You own AI agents, copilots and LLM-based applications end to end, from design to production. The focus is on efficiency, scalability and the creation of new AI-driven products and services.
...
- Beyond hands-on delivery, you act as a technical advisor and enabler. You help teams and clients turn AI potential into concrete, implementable solutions. You also contribute to the development of new AI-driven products across data, analytics and MarTech.
...
- You play a key role in building AI maturity across the organization. This includes sharing knowledge, mentoring others and driving innovation within GenAI and MLOps. You help shape best practices that allow the organization to scale and evolve its AI capabilities over time.
...
- You have 5+ years of experience in Data Engineering, ML Engineering, Analytics Engineering, or similar technical roles, and are comfortable operating across the full lifecycle of data- and AI-drive systems.
...
- Extensive experience in designing data pipelines, and proficiency in SQL, Python, and spark.
...
- You have proven experience with cloud architecture and implementing scalable data infrastructure and solutions.
...
- You have a strong grasp of API design, system integration, and service-based architecture, and the ability to connect AI components into larger technical ecosystems.

Ads AI Team Overview: Assets, Formats & Placements (AFP)
...
The AFP team defines how ad creatives are packaged and delivered across LinkedIn — evolving Assets (media, metadata, creative components), standardized Formats (single image, video, carousel, document, conversation), and Placements (feed, messaging surfaces, network apps, emerging surfaces). We partner closely with Ads AI, Measurement, and Serving to provide the schema, APIs, and delivery runtime that enable creative portability, policy compliance, and cross-surface quality — so advertisers can launch once and scale everywhere with predictable outcomes.

The Data Scientist role involves deploying end-to-end machine learning production, building infrastructure, and integrating ML models while collaborating with stakeholders to enhance data-driven decision-making. Responsibilities Build the infrastructure required for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading of data from a wide variety of data sources using cloud technologies Develop solutions that will deliver high quality personalized recommendations across different channels to our customers Develop end-to-end (Data/Dev/MLOps) pipelines based on in-depth understanding of Cloud Platforms, AI/ML lifecycle, and business problems to ensure solutions are delivered efficiently and sustainably Work with Data science team to ensure seamless integration and support of machine learning models operation Collaborate with team members and deliver projects on-time with full quality Manage multiple projects concurrently to ensure successful completion of projects Skills Master's or Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or related field 1-2 years of experience as Data Engineer, or ML Engineer deploying hands-on projects 1+ years of experience in Python, PySpark, Databricks, Data Pipelines, ETL Processes, Data Modeling, Relational and Non-relational databases (NoSQL is a plus) Good working experience in Cloud Technologies (AWS or Azure) Familiar with Data Lake Architecture, Integration of Structured and Unstructured data, ML Flow tools, Automated Unit test frameworks Understanding of version control (Git) and software engineering best practices Working knowledge of Machine learning algorithms (supervised/unsupervised, model evaluation) Exposure to MLOps tools (Docker, CI/CD, model deployment) is a plus Good written and spoken communication skills Great team player and ability collaborate with larger team Benefits Paid Family Care for parents and caregivers for 12 weeks or more Monetary assistance and support for Adoption, Surrogacy and Fertility Monetary assistance and support for pet adoption Employee Assistance Programs and Health/Wellness/Comfort reimbursements to help you invest in your future and work/life balance Tuition Assistance Paid time off that includes Flexible Time off Vacation, Annual Sick Days, Volunteer Days, Holiday and Identity days, and more Matching Gifts programs Flexible working arrangements 'Work Your World' Program encouraging employees to work from anywhere Publicis Groupe has an office for up to 6 weeks a year (based upon eligibility) Business Resource Groups that support multiple affinities and alliances Company Overview A division of Publicis Groupe, Publicis Digital Experience is a network of top-tier agencies designed to develop capabilities and solutions to enable growth and provide scaled access to the digital capabilities of Publicis Groupe in service of our clients. It was founded in undefined, and is headquartered in New York, NY, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is .

results.title: Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
...
# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
Posted Jun 3
...
, 2026
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
...
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
...
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.
...
Date of posting: 1/14/2026

results.title: Head of AI Centre of Excellence (Data Science, Agentic & Gen AI) at orbition group - Australia | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Head of AI Centre of Excellence (Data Science, Agentic & Gen AI)
...
Lead the AI Centre of Excellence for a global financial organisation, shaping strategy and driving Agentic and Generative AI initiatives across business banking. Manage a team of 12-14 data scientists and oversee productionisation of advanced AI systems with technical and commercial leadership. Provide strategic guidance, risk management, and cross-functional collaboration within a matrix team structure.
...
Own Agentic AI and Generative AI productionisation
...
Lead development of innovative Agentic AI and Gen AI solutions to complex organisational problems
...
Drive expansion and adoption of Generative AI and Agentic AI solutions within business banking

largest organisations in their industry.

, prompt engineering, RAG, guardrail design, orchestration design, and familiarity with frameworks like Semantic Kernel and LangGraph.
